heading: Notifications to Congress regarding assistance
label: 5476 Notifications to Congress regarding assistance
text: Section 634A of the Foreign Assistance Act of 1961 (; relating to reprogramming notifications) applies with respect to obligations of funds made available under that Act [ et seq.] to carry out this chapter, notwithstanding any other provision of this chapter.22 U.S.C. 2394–122 U.S.C. 2151
notes: References in TextThe Foreign Assistance Act of 1961, referred to in text, is , , , which is classified principally to chapter 32 (§ 2151 et seq.) of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub.
